Super 35 telephoto cine zoom, PL interchangeable mount. Current. Optically identical to laowa-ranger-s35-50-130mm-t2-9; lighter magnesium alloy housing (~10% weight reduction). Source: bhphotovideo.com.
Full Frame 10× parfocal cine zoom (46.5mm image circle — covers Full Frame and VistaVision), PL mount. Current. ~$65,000. 8-blade iris, 0.8 MOD gears. Source: bhphotovideo.com.

Full Frame parfocal cine zoom (44mm image circle), PL and EF native mount versions (sold separately). Current. ~$2,899. 22 elements in 18 groups, 11-blade iris, negligible focus breathing. Source: bhphotovideo.com.

Super 35 cine zoom, PL mount. Discontinued. DSMC era. 4.5 kg. Focus rotation 271°, zoom rotation 120°. Available used market. Original RED product pages no longer active.

Macro probe zoom lens (43.2mm image circle), PL mount. Current. ~$3,499. NOT a conventional cine zoom — 2.1× magnification, 6mm working distance, IP57 waterproof/dustproof. Available in 0°/90°/360° configurations. Source: bhphotovideo.com.
Large Format telephoto cine zoom (54.12mm image circle), PL mount. Rental-only, not commercially sold. Vantage Film (Munich). Source: vantagefilm.com.

Large Format 10× parfocal cine zoom (60mm image circle — covers ARRI Alexa 65 / Open Gate), LPL mount. Current. ~$100,000. 8-blade iris, 0.8 MOD gears. Source: cined.com.

Large Format cine zoom (54.12mm image circle — covers ARRI Alexa Open Gate and IMAX 65), PL mount. Current. ~$42,900.
